## Summary

-

## Scope

- [ ] Change is scoped to the linked issue or request.
- [ ] No unrelated formatting churn, refactors, or drive-by cleanup are mixed in.
- [ ] New abstractions or broad patterns are justified by the change.

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant validation commands were run, or the reason they were not run is documented.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for changed behavior where applicable.
- [ ] Manual review was performed for documentation-only changes.

Validation performed:

```text
Add public-safe command names and results here.
```

## Changelog

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Not user-facing / changelog not needed

## Public and private boundary

- [ ] Public-facing content is accurate, supportable, and safe for public repositories.
- [ ] No private operational details or sensitive examples are included.
- [ ] Internal architecture, runtime contracts, validation records, security baselines, incident details, and private planning records remain in the appropriate private or repo-local location.

## Review notes

Add reviewer context, known tradeoffs, or follow-up issues. Use `Refs #123` for non-closing references and `Closes #123` only when this PR should close an issue on merge to the default branch.
